step_rationale: Ceramide directly associated with CAD severity and recurrent ACS; pro-inflammatory lipid species driving atherosclerotic burden.
mechanism: Cer(d18:1/18:0) amplifies lipid retention and inflammatory signaling in atherosclerotic plaques, predicting adverse thrombotic events.

references.title: Prognostic Value of Ceramide Dynamics in Patients with Acute Coronary Syndrome.
references.journal: Studies in health technology and informatics

references.title: Associations of NAFLD with circulating ceramides and impaired glycemia.
Association between ceramides and coronary artery stenosis in patients with coronary artery disease.
